_notes.todays-tix: schema.org JSON-LD on listing page. ~43 events, fixture-backed in v1 (page is JS-rendered; needs playwright for live).
_notes.broadway-sf: MUI cards on a React app. ~2 events live. fixture-backed in v1 (page is JS-rendered).
_notes.sfmoma: .archive--type-event cards on /events/ (NOT /calendar/ which is exhibitions). Live fetch working.
_notes.act: Two-stage: extract show URLs from /whats-on/2025-26-season → schema.org Event JSON-LD per show. Live fetch working.
_notes.berkeley-rep: Per-perf JSON-LD per show (43 entries for one show), collapsed to one Event with start=earliest, end=latest. Live fetch working.
_notes.sf-playhouse: Two-stage: extract show URLs from /2025-2026-season/ → parse date range from page text. Live fetch working.
_notes.magic-theatre: Squarespace cards with embedded Google Calendar export URLs. UTC dates in URL params, converted to PT via Intl.DateTimeFormat. Live fetch working.
_notes.asian-art: calendar.asianart.org subdomain. <article class=card data-time=<unix>>. Live fetch working.
_notes.famsf: TODO: /calendar URL works but page is heavily JS-rendered. Needs playwright + page.waitForSelector. Skipped in v1.
_notes.bampfa: TODO: /calendar has 297 event links but dates are inferred from a 'April 2026' page header + day-of-month headers spanning months. Needs custom date-rollover logic. Skipped in v1.
_notes.luma: TODO: lu.ma/discover/sf-bay-area is JS-rendered + anti-bot. Hardest source. Use /scrape + /skillify with playwright when ready.
_notes.hyperallergic: REMOVED 2026-04-29: Hyperallergic doesn't have a flat SF-events listing. Their 'Opportunities' page is calls-for-entries / residencies — not what we want. Drop from scope.
